API Reference¶

Flask App¶

app.create_app(test_config=None)¶
app.create_db_connection(database_url=None)¶
app.insert_new_applicants(connection, applicant_data)¶
app.run_module_2_script(script_name)¶
app.run_query(connection, query)¶

Scrape¶

scrape.combine_scraped_parts()¶
scrape.load_data(filename)¶

Loads cleaned data from a JSON file.

scrape.main()¶
scrape.save_data(cleaned_data, filename)¶

Saves cleaned data into a JSON file.

scrape.scrape_data(start_page=1, end_page=5)¶

this function scrapes data using selenium and uses beautiful soup to parse the html

Clean¶

clean.clean_data(raw_data)¶

this is the function to clean the raw data

clean.load_data(filename)¶

Loads cleaned data from a JSON file.

clean.main()¶
clean.save_data(cleaned_data, filename)¶

Saves cleaned data into a JSON file.

Load Data¶

Query Data¶

query_data.create_db_connection(db_name, db_user, db_password, db_host, db_port)¶

create conenction to my db

query_data.execute_query(connection, query)¶
query_data.execute_read_query(connection, query)¶
